mnemonics: Fuzzy Means Flexible - remember fuzzy logic deals with degrees of truth, not just true/false
Membership Matters - recall that membership functions define how much an element belongs to a set
keyPoints: Fuzzy models handle uncertainty and vagueness
They use membership functions to quantify set belonging
Applied in NLP for ambiguous word meanings
Different from probability which deals with likelihood
Based on fuzzy set theory introduced by Zadeh
commonMistakes: Confusing fuzzy logic with probability theory
Using fuzzy models where binary logic is sufficient
